# Memory Index

This is the project memory primary index. Read this file first to find what you need in the memory.

## Structure

- Each `.md` file in memory/ covers a **macro topic** about the project.
- A subfolder in memory/ is used when a topic grows large enough to need multiple file.md.
- Every subfolder has its own `INDEX.md` listing its contents. 
- If you choose to browse a subfolder in memory/ read the subfolder's `INDEX.md` before everything else in the subfolder.

Only read files relevant to your current task. Do not explore the full memory.

## Contents

_No memory entries yet._
